news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Batesville-based company Hillenbrand, Inc. (NYSE: HI) revealed that their Senior Vice President and CFO, Robert "Bob" VanHimbergen, will be leaving the company for a new role starting June 27, 2025. The company confirmed this news in an official statement.
news.headline: Hillenbrand CFO Bob VanHimbergen to leave company, effective June 27, 2025.

news.summary: Wintermute, a prominent algorithmic trading firm and OTC desk, has recently named Ron Hammond as the Head of Policy and Advocacy. Hammond previously served as the lead lobbyist at Blockchain Association. This announcement coincides with the company's ongoing recruitment efforts in the United States for various key roles. The news was made public on May 15, 2025, in New York.
news.headline: Wintermute enters US with NYC HQ, appoints Ron Hammond as Head of Policy, continues US hiring. May 15, 2025.

news.summary: EcoFlow, a key player in eco-friendly portable power solutions, has launched its latest product, the RIVER 3 Plus Wireless power station, at approximately 500 Costco stores across the United States. This marks the company's largest in-store rollout to date. The announcement was made in Seattle on May 15, 2025.
news.headline: EcoFlow partners with Costco for in-store rollout of RIVER 3 Plus in 500 US locations, expanding eco-friendly power solutions.

news.summary: In Louisville, Kentucky as of May 15, 2025, Advantum Health, a top healthcare revenue cycle management solutions provider, has been named one of the 2025 Best Places to Work in Healthcare by Modern Healthcare. This recognition highlights the company's commitment to employee satisfaction and positive work environment. They were chosen among a list of top healthcare organizations as part of this year's prestigious award.
news.headline: Advantum Health in Louisville named one of the Best Places to Work in Healthcare by Modern Healthcare for 2025.

news.summary: Jim Chanos, previously against Bitcoin, is now shorting shares of Strategy and buying Bitcoin, citing a significant price mismatch. He believes retail speculation is inflating stock valuations of companies like Strategy, which holds around 568,840 BTC valued at $59 billion, with its stock rising by 1,500%. Despite past criticisms of Bitcoin, Chanos now sees value in holding the cryptocurrency directly. He is well-known for his successful shorting of Enron but faced losses with Tesla. His fund ended with $405 million in assets in 2020. Chanos' move highlights concerns about excessive speculation in the crypto sector and mispricing of risk.
news.headline: Short-seller Jim Chanos shorts Strategy, buys Bitcoin; sees mismatch as Strategy stock outperforms. Investors lose $3.3B betting against firm holding 568,840 BTC (approx $59B). Strategy touted as best equity. Chanos switches stance on Bitcoin, once calling it fantasy, criticizing illicit use. Chanos known for Enron short._RTC ETFs skepticism.Chanos faces losses.

news.summary: Starting from May 15, 2025, investment firms and private companies have been granted access to crucial strategic, real-time, and historical data. This allows them to outperform competitors, bolster talent acquisition and retention efforts, and achieve success on a worldwide scale. J. Thelander Consulting has emerged as the frontrunner in providing these services in Miami. The data available empowers organizations to stay ahead of the curve and enhance their operations, ultimately enabling them to thrive in a fiercely competitive environment.
news.headline: J. Thelander Consulting launches global compensation tool for private capital markets; provides real-time data for competitive edge.

news.summary: In BINYAMINA, Israel and CARY, N.C., a momentous development occurred on May 15, 2025, as OncoHost, a pioneering technology firm dedicated to revolutionizing precision medicine to enhance patient results, joined forces with prestigious collaborators including Heidelberg University Hospital, European Institute of Oncology, and Virgen.
news.headline: OncoHost gets €2.5M grant from EIC Transition Programme for precision oncology in immunotherapy.

news.summary: Royal Caribbean is offering vacationers unprecedented opportunities for memorable experiences. Perfect Day Mexico set a new record with groundbreaking activities. Travelers can enjoy ultimate beach days and create lasting memories. The company is introducing unique vacation options, promising unforgettable moments. Royal Caribbean's innovative approach is revolutionizing the travel industry.
news.headline: Royal Caribbean unveils Perfect Day Mexico + 3 new destination experiences, offering unforgettable vacations.

news.summary: NovoEd, a top enterprise talent development tech provider based in San Francisco, revealed on May 15, 2025, their deployment of AI-based guidance and a well-organized system to improve access and involvement, facilitating rapid skill enhancement and institutional knowledge growth. The strategy aims to boost engagement and accessibility for skill development.
news.headline: NovoEd launches Mentor+, a 1:1 learning solution using AI-driven guidance to accelerate skill development.

news.summary: NiSource Inc. (NYSE: NI) and its subsidiaries, including Northern Indiana Public Service Company LLC (NIPSCO) and various Columbia Gas entities, have been recognized for their trustworthiness as utility brands. A study by Escalent, the 2025 Cogent Syndicated Utility Trusted Brand & Customer Engagement: Residential report, identified 40 top utilities, with the NiSource companies occupying four positions within this group. The recognition highlights the strong reputation and reliability of these utilities in the industry.
news.headline: NiSource Inc. brands ranked most trusted utilities, securing 4 spots in top 40, as per Escalent's study. #CustomerSatisfaction

news.summary: Last week, there were over 500 new cases of a mysterious illness reported in a small town. Authorities are investigating the cause of the outbreak, which has resulted in 10 deaths so far. The symptoms include fever, nausea, and severe coughing. Health officials are urging residents to stay indoors and take precautionary measures to prevent the spread of the disease. The town's hospital is currently overwhelmed with patients, leading to concerns about the healthcare system's capacity to handle the crisis. Residents are being advised to seek medical attention immediately if they experience any symptoms. The town has initiated a lockdown and is providing free testing for all residents to control the spread of the illness.
news.headline: New enterprise NVMe SSD by KIOXIA uses 8th gen. BiCS FLASH TLC-based tech. Great news!

news.summary: EverDriven, a prominent provider of Alternative Student Transportation, is expanding its presence across the country and amplifying its impact by welcoming top technology executives Mon-Chaio Lo and Courtney Pallotta to its team. Mon-Chaio Lo has been appointed as the Chief Product and Technology Officer and will spearhead the enhancement of EverDriven's AI-driven technology platform. This initiative aims to boost product advancement and provide more intelligent and scalable offerings for students, families, and school districts.
news.headline: EverDriven adds new Chief Product & Technology Officer and Chief Marketing Officer to scale its alternative student transportation, with Mon-Chaio Lo and Courtney Pallotta joining. Lo will lead AI-powered technology platform development for smarter solutions.

news.summary: A recent collaboration between YCharts and LPL Financial's ClientWorks has been revealed in Chicago, aiming to enhance advisor workflows and boost client engagement. This direct integration will facilitate smoother processes and interaction for advisors, helping them better serve their clients.
news.headline: YCharts integrates with LPL Financial's ClientWorks to enhance advisor workflows & client engagement.

news.summary: In Chicago, GE HealthCare (Nasdaq: GEHC) has introduced CleaRecon DL, leveraging deep-learning technology to enhance the clarity of cone-beam computed tomography (CBCT) images. This innovative AI-powered tool aims to eliminate streak artifacts stemming from blood flow pulsatility in arteries and contrast distribution variations during CBCT scans in liver, prostate, neuro, and endovascular aortic repair procedures.
news.headline: GE HealthCare debuts CleaRecon DL, AI-based 3D reconstruction to combat imaging issues, aimed at liver, prostate, neuro, and aortic repair procedures.

news.summary: Twist Bioscience Corporation (NASDAQ: TWST) based in South San Francisco, California, a prominent mid-cap company in the life sciences sector of healthcare, revealed that Patrick Finn, Ph.D., the President and COO, is scheduled to speak at the William Blair 45th Annual Growth Stock Conference on June 3, 2025, at 10:00 am Central Time in Chicago, Illinois. This event will be live webcasted and interested individuals can tune in by visiting the “Investor” section of the company's website.
news.headline: Twist Bioscience to present at William Blair conference on June 3, 2025 in Chicago at 10 am Central Time.

news.summary: Karly Rowe, an experienced leader known for empowering provider organizations, has been named as the President of Inovalon's Provider Business Unit based in Bowie, Maryland.rowData brings a wealth of experience and expertise to her new role, and will be responsible for overseeing operations in this division.
news.headline: Karly Rowe appointed as President of Inovalon's Provider Business Unit, aims to empower provider organizations.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, COPE Health Solutions (CHS) has appointed Richard Petrucci, MD, as its new Chief Medical Officer. Dr. Petrucci, with extensive experience as a CMO and medical director in health plans and fully delegated IPAs, will oversee medical management, clinical analytics, financial analytics, and value-based care at CHS. This move underscores CHS's commitment to enhancing its services in the realm of value-based care.
news.headline: COPE Health Solutions appoints Dr. Richard Petrucci as Chief Medical Officer, enhancing expertise in value-based care.

news.summary: In Denver, Lumen Technologies (NYSE: LUMN) revealed the appointment of Michelle J. Goldberg and Steve McMillan to its Board of Directors. This move was confirmed during the company’s 2025 annual meeting of shareholders on May 15, 2025. Kate Johnson, President and CEO of Lumen, stated that the expertise of Goldberg and McMillan will be crucial as Lumen evolves to meet the digital networking demands of its enterprise clients. Michelle brings with her experience in scaling operations, while Steve's background in technology will be beneficial for the board and the company going forward.
news.headline: Lumen Technologies appoints Michelle J. Goldberg and Steve McMillan to board, enhancing AI and digital strategy.

news.summary: In Boston today, VideaHealth unveiled VideaInsights, an innovative dental analytics tool catered for Dental Service Organizations (DSOs) and practice owners with multiple locations. With advanced AI technology, VideaInsights aims to enhance care quality, provide confident coaching, and facilitate smarter growth strategies. This solution offers precise insights into clinical practices at both individual provider and practice-wide levels. It has the capacity to uncover up to $100,000 in additional treatment opportunities per practice.
news.headline: VideaHealth launches VideaInsights, AI dental analytics to help DSOs improve care, $100,000+ extra treatment opportunities.

news.summary: Pavilion Payments, a prominent omnichannel payment solutions provider in the gaming sector, has recently promoted Lori Lawson to the position of Chief Operations Officer. Lawson, who previously held the role of Vice President of the Program Management Office and oversaw Gaming Operations and PMO at Pavilion Payments from 2021, will now be taking on expanded responsibilities in her new role. During her tenure, Lawson spearheaded various essential projects, such as introducing a specialized technician help desk, enhancing project management resources, and implementing operational strategies to improve overall efficiency.
news.headline: Pavilion Payments promotes Lori Lawson to COO after her successful tenure as VP of PMO. Major initiatives include technician help desk launch and project management expansion.

news.summary: An Israeli-based company, Wi-Charge, has recently secured $20 million in funding to enhance its wireless power technology and broaden its partnerships with original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) in order to meet the increasing global demand. The company aims to expand its reach across various sectors including retail, smart home, and commercial industries.
news.headline: Wi-Charge raises $20M to expand wireless power platform globally, focusing on retail, smart home & commercial sectors.

news.summary: In Wilmington, North Carolina, a prominent digital banking solutions provider, Apiture, revealed the names of the 2025 "Apiture Innovators" during its yearly client conference, Apiture Accelerate.
news.headline: Apiture announced 2025 "Apiture Innovators" at Apiture Accelerate 2025 Conference, a leading digital banking solutions provider.

news.summary: Onto Innovation Inc. (NYSE: ONTO) disclosed that its senior management team is set to attend two significant investor events in May 2025. Firstly, they will participate at the B. Riley Securities 25th Annual Institutional Investor Conference held at the Ritz Carlton in Marina Del Ray, California, on May 22nd. Subsequently, they will also attend the TD Cowen 53rd Annual Technology, Media & Telecom Conference at the InterContinental New York Barclay in New York City on May 28th. These events offer key opportunities for investors and stakeholders to engage with the company.
news.headline: Onto Innovation (NYSE: ONTO) to join investor events on May 22, 2025 at B. Riley Securities Conference in California and May 28, 2025 at TD Cowen Conference in New York.

news.summary: Atlanta-based Infinity Capital Partners, operating as "Infinity Funds," has acquired boutique investment firm Soundlink Partners. Infinity Funds, known for providing alternative investment solutions to registered investment advisers, family offices, and institutional allocators, finalized the strategic acquisition of Soundlink Partners, which specializes in healthcare-focused investment strategies. The acquisition combines the expertise of Soundlink Partners' experienced principals with Infinity Funds' offerings.
news.headline: Infinity Capital Partners acquires Soundlink Partners, specializing in healthcare investments. Transaction consolidates expertise.

news.summary: In Boston, HqO, a prominent real estate experience platform, revealed the introduction of the first-ever customer experience system of record in commercial real estate. This innovative platform covers tenant engagement, operator performance, and investor value creation. It integrates asset management, tenant lifecycle, and operational workflows, providing property owners and operators with a unified and user-friendly system. This solution aims to enhance loyalty, efficiency, and long-term asset value.
news.headline: HqO introduces CRE's first system of record for customer experience in commercial real estate, unifying asset management, tenant engagement, and operator performance.

news.summary: In Westlake Village, California, PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust (NYSE: PMT) released news that its Board of Trustees has approved cash dividends for the second quarter of 2025 on its preferred shares. The 8.125% Series A Preferred Shares (NYSE: PMT PRA), the 8.000% Series B Preferred Shares (NYSE: PMT PRB), and the 6.750% Series C Preferred Shares (NYSE: PMT PRC) will be receiving dividends. As per the terms for each preferred series, the dividend rates are as follows: Series A - 8.125% annual dividend rate, Series B - 8.000% annual dividend rate, and Series C - 6.750% annual dividend rate.
news.headline: PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust declares Q2 2025 dividends for its preferred shares (PMT PRA, PMT PRB, PMT PRC) with varying rates.

news.summary: In Philadelphia, Sila Services, a prominent home services provider, is excited to reveal the successful graduation of its recent class of skilled trades professionals from Sila University Project LiveFire. This innovative program, designed to tackle the skilled labor shortage, is an eight-week paid training initiative that offers a contemporary and inclusive entry into the HVAC trade. Participants receive industry-recognized certifications upon completion, contributing to addressing the current workforce challenges.
news.headline: Sila Services announces the graduation of skilled trades professionals from Sila University Project LiveFire, an 8-week paid training program offering a pathway into HVAC trade.

news.summary: EquityProtect has announced a new partnership with real estate brokerages across the country to offer homeowners protection against the increasing risk of title theft.
news.headline: EquityProtect teams with brokerages nationwide to fight title fraud, safeguarding homeowners.

news.summary: In Seattle, pending U.S. home sales experienced a 3.4% year-over-year decline in the four weeks ending May 11, hitting their lowest level for this period since 2020, as reported by Redfin. The decrease is attributed to two primary factors: escalating home-sale prices and higher mortgage rates. This has led to a median monthly housing payment of $2,860, just $6 short of the all-time high. The data was released by the technology-driven real estate brokerage firm, Redfin.
news.headline: Pending U.S. home sales fell 3.4% in May due to high prices, mortgage rates, reaching $2,860/month.

news.summary: In Franklin, Tennessee, Next Level Education (NLE), a company offering continuing education for the mortgage sector, has purchased Summit Mortgage Training located in Hanover, NJ. Andrea Gagliardi, the founder of Summit, has been appointed as the Director of Content Management at Next Level. This acquisition aims to boost Next Level Education's expansion and provide broader reach to mortgage professionals on the East Coast.
news.headline: Next Level Education acquires Summit Mortgage Training in a strategic move to expand its reach, with Andrea Gagliardi as Director.

news.summary: In New York, the forward-thinking technology venture capital firm Black Opal Ventures, established by Managing Directors Dr. Tara Bishop and Eileen Tanghal, has unveiled its 2024 annual Impact Report. This comprehensive report highlights the firm’s investment principles and applauds the significant influence of its portfolio companies. These companies utilize cutting-edge technologies to address the critical issues in modern healthcare. A notable statistic revealed in the report is that U.S. healthcare spending is projected to reach [specific number] in the upcoming year.
news.headline: Black Opal Ventures' annual Impact Report highlights tech firms in healthcare solving complex challenges. Impressive 2024 results.

news.summary: Odysight.ai Inc., a prominent provider of visual-based predictive maintenance (PdM) and condition-based monitoring (CBM) solutions, has released its financial results for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The company, trading under the ticker symbol ODYS on the NASDAQ, is based in OMER, Israel. They have reported important figures for this period and shared a business update in May 15, 2025.
news.headline: Odysight.ai announces Q1 2025 financial results, a leading PdM provider, with a business update.

news.summary: A recent study has revealed that Company's PlaCCine® technology platform exhibits enhanced durability and other benefits when compared to mRNA vaccines. The research highlighted that PlaCCine® showed a significant increase in effectiveness, with a 25% higher efficacy rate and a longer-lasting protection period of up to 6 months. This discovery underscores the potential of PlaCCine® as a promising alternative in the field of vaccine development. Further investigation is underway to explore its full capabilities and potential applications in combating various diseases.
news.headline: IMUNON's PlaCCine ® DNA vaccine shows promise in 6-month data, proving better durability & advantages over mRNA vaccines.

news.summary: Greenland Technologies Holding Corporation reported a revenue of $21.7 million in the first quarter of 2025 compared to $22.7 million in the same period in 2024. Gross margin expanded by 580 basis points year over year. Operating expenses were reduced by 50% year over year. Earnings per share increased by 61% year over year. The total cost of goods sold decreased by 12.1% to $15.02 million. The gross profit increased by 18.0% to $6.66 million. Total operating expenses were $1.85 million, a 50.2% decrease from the first quarter of 2024. Net income was $4.56 million, a $0.99 million increase from the same period in 2024. Greenland had approximately $5.40 million in cash and cash equivalents. The company had $21.42 million in accounts receivables. Greenland Technologies Holding Corporation is focused on developing and manufacturing electric industrial vehicles and drivetrain systems.
news.headline: Greenland Technologies' 1Q25 revenue slightly declined to $21.7M, but increased gross margin by 580 points and reduced operating expenses by 50%. Earnings per share rose 61%.
